title: Standard Sample Processing Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"h7wmk","text":"This protocol was established in the frame of a FP7 EU project OCTIPS (Ovarian Cancer – Innovative Models Prolong Survival; Contract No. 279113).\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8fvax","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bcftc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bl2lh","text":"\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lzqf0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"oj13q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2vxas","text":"In this protocol, we describe the collection and processing of tumor tissues from high grade serous ovarian cancer patients, the extraction of DNA and RNA from fresh frozen tumor tissues, from paraffin-embedded tissues and from EDTA blood, the construction of tissue microarray (TMA), and the establishment of cell lines from ascites and tumor tissues.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Ensure that all equipment is functional.
Gather necessary materials: laptop, projector, presentation clicker.
Connect the laptop to the projector using an HDMI cable.
Power on the projector by pressing the power button located on the top.
Select the correct HDMI input using the projector's remote control. Note: If the projector does not automatically detect the HDMI input, manually select it through the menu options.
Open the presentation file on your laptop. Use the presentation clicker to navigate through slides.
Ensure to adhere to the presentation schedule to avoid overlaps.
If the display is unclear, adjust the focus using the focus ring on the projector lens.
For laptop audio issues, Check the volume settings on both the laptop and external speakers.
Ensure the room lights are dimmed to enhance projection visibility. For any issues unresolved by these steps, refer to the comprehensive guide available at this link .
We declare that we have no competing interests.
Supplement_0.Docx Supplementary Note 1 OCTIPS (#279113) Standard Sample Processing Protocol V2
creator: Protocols Importer
